heading: Report
label: 3056f Report
text: To carry out the Secretary’s responsibilities for reporting in , the Secretary shall require the State agency for each State that receives funds under this subchapter to prepare and submit a report at the beginning of each fiscal year on such State’s compliance with . Such report shall include the names and geographic location of all projects assisted under this subchapter and carried out in the State and the amount allocated to each such project under .section 3056a(g) of this titlesection 3056e(b) of this titlesection 3056d of this title
